name: Kevin Stein
background: Dr. Stein has served as President and CEO since 2018. He was COO from 2016 to 2018 and joined the company in 2014 as COO of the Power & Control Group. Previously, he held executive roles at Precision Castparts Corp.

companies.name: TransDigm Group Incorporated
companies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
